raw.message: 👑 Faites face à Sa Majestœuf et récoltez des œufs mystiques. Échangez-les contre des objets rares, des bonus et des améliorations

hook.summary: Easter event reward showcase with a pink aesthetic.
hook.visual_action: A reward card fades in over a scenic cherry blossom background with Easter eggs and a rabbit.
hook.text_overlay: D'un seul œuf à quelque chose de gros

scene_flow: The ad opens with a soft pink fade-in of the Black Desert logo and event title.
A central UI panel appears showcasing three distinct reward icons: a scroll, an orb, and a lamp.
Text descriptions for the rewards populate the panel, highlighting high-value items like Cron stones.
The scene remains static to allow the viewer to read the reward details and the 'Collect & Exchange' CTA.
on_screen_text: D'un seul œuf à quelque chose de gros
Meubles sur le thème de Pâques
audience_proxy: French-speaking MMORPG players interested in seasonal events and high-value in-game rewards.
